title: Trying to create a RACING SERIES with invalid data types
gherkin:
When the user tries to create a "RACING SERIES" with the following data
  | key          | value |
  | name         | true  |
  | short_name   | true  |
  | founded      | true  |
  | defunct      | true  |
  | organized_by | true  |
  | vehicle_type | true  |
  | country_code | true  |
Then the request should be rejected with status code 400
